caption: A man with a distinctive tall, greyish-blonde hairstyle and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white shirt with suspenders and a red bow tie. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone. In the background, a woman with pink hair and a green dress stands near a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS". On the wall behind them is a framed picture of a man and a logo of a shield with a stylized "G" inside. Red and white text overlays on the screen read "#BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak and begins to gesture with his left hand, which moves into the frame to emphasize his point. The camera remains static, focusing on the man's profile as he interacts with an unseen person off-camera.
